title: paeonia officinalis var. hirsuta
intro: Paeonia officinalis var. hirsuta, also known as the hirsute peony, is a variant of the Paeonia officinalis plant, a flowering perennial plant native to Europe and Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, which are attributed to the presence of glycosides and flavonoids. The health benefits of Paeonia officinalis var. hirsuta include relief from menstrual cramps, menopausal symptoms, and anxiety, as well as its ability to reduce fever and promote digestion. Paeonia officinalis var. hirsuta is often prepared as a tincture, tea, or ointment, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of health issues.
